meta.title: Unlock data from your files with Agentic Document Extraction
meta.description:
In our course with LandingAI, "Document AI: From OCR to Agentic Doc Extraction", you'll learn to unlock information from files containing handwritten formulas, nested captions, or overlapping watermarks.

After exploring optical character recognition, layout detection, reading order, and multimodal models, you’ll build agents to combine these capabilities as tools. Together they will parse and extract information into usable formats for downstream applications.

Enroll for free: https://bit.ly/3Lmuqxf
